subcodes.first_line: The fragrances of the All-Merciful have been wafted throughout all contingent being, and they that are sincere are in manifest ecstasy, as the fragrance of His garment hath been diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاحت نفحه الرحمن فی الامکان و المخلصون فی وله مبین قد تضوعت رائحه القمیص
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
